result: Successfully implemented IN-001 Waves A-E: (1) Added 18 campaign event names to event-names.ts, (2) Added campaignId/laneId/role fields to runtime-event.ts, event.sql.ts, and event-store.ts, (3) Created campaign-event.ts schema bridge, (4) Created context-packet.ts with buildContextPacket and formatPacketForLLM, (5) Created projector.ts CampaignProjector Effect Service, (6) Refactored secretary.ts to use canonical LANE_STATE_MACHINE from state-machine.ts, removing private reduceState and adding EventStore write-through + init() replay, (7) Updated campaign/index.ts with new exports.
